rules.label: couch
rules.issue: Seating alignment is reducing positive flow in the room.
rules.fix: Reposition the sofa so primary seating aligns toward East or North.

rules.label: tv
rules.issue: TV placement is creating visual and energy imbalance.
rules.fix: Move the TV unit to the South-East or South wall.

rules.label: potted plant
rules.issue: Greenery is not positioned in a growth-supporting zone.
rules.fix: Place plants in the North-East or East corner.

rules.label: clock
rules.issue: Clock placement may affect directional balance.
rules.fix: Shift wall clock toward North or East.

rules.label: bed
rules.issue: Bed location is weakening grounding and sleep stability.
rules.fix: Position the bed toward South-West for better stability.

rules.label: mirror
rules.fix: Move mirror to North/East side and avoid direct bed reflection.

rules.label: window
rules.issue: Natural light direction is suboptimal for a bedroom.
rules.fix: Encourage morning light from East/North with lighter treatments.

rules.label: sink
rules.issue: Water element placement is clashing with kitchen energy.
rules.fix: Shift sink/water use toward North or North-East.

rules.label: refrigerator
rules.issue: Refrigerator location is reducing directional harmony.
rules.fix: Keep the fridge on West or South-West side where possible.

rules.label: window
rules.issue: Kitchen daylight alignment is weaker than ideal.
rules.fix: Prioritize East-side ventilation and morning daylight.

rules.label: lamp
rules.issue: Prayer-lamp placement does not align with fire element guidance.
rules.fix: Position diya/lamp toward South-East of the altar setup.

rules.label: dining table
rules.issue: Work/study surface orientation can be improved for focus.
rules.fix: Position desk/table so usage aligns with East or North direction.

rules.label: clock
rules.issue: Clock placement is not ideal for study-zone rhythm.
rules.fix: Move clock to North or East wall in the study room.
